{{CargoRelic
|name=Hina Doll
|class_id=22077
|rank=Blue
|affct=CIV
|birthday=11-27
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.26%), Wishing (0.14%)
|description=On Nov 27, 1924 AD, the earliest Hina Doll was created in Japan.<br>The Hina Doll is a puppet made based on ancient Japanese court figures and is regarded as a magic tool. It is often displayed on a stepped wooden altar covered with red cloth along with various decorations. The doll is known for its exquisite features. People will spruce the doll up a day before the Girl's Day to ward off disasters for the girls in the family, and put it away again after the festival.
|fame=33
|art=26
|fth=26
|civ=45
|tech=24
|ss1=Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +6m
|ss2=Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +12m
|ss3=Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +18m
|ss4=Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +30m
|ss7=Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +30m<br>Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +30m (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Goldfish skill I.png|50px]]Place in Goldfish Biozilla: In Species War, All Minion DEF +1.5%
}}
